categories.name: Switching Topology & Operating Point
reference_questions: What is the switching topology? Provide a schematic of the power stage.
What is the switching frequency, input voltage range, output voltage, and maximum current?
What is the duty cycle range at voltage and load extremes? Provide volt-second balance equation.
What is the measured efficiency vs load curve from 10% to 100% load?
What is the output voltage ripple and load regulation at full load?

categories.name: Magnetic Design
reference_questions: What core material, shape, and size are used? Provide manufacturer part number.
What is Bpeak, Bsat, and core loss at operating frequency?
What is inductance value, AL value, and number of turns for each winding?
How is air gap length determined? Provide inductance vs DC bias curve.
What is the winding arrangement and measured leakage inductance?

categories.name: Gate Drive & Switch Selection
reference_questions: What switching devices are used? Provide part number, Vds, Id, and Rds(on).
What is gate drive voltage, peak gate current, and gate resistor value?
What is measured switching loss per transition?
How is dead-time set and what is its value?
What protection circuits are implemented with trip levels?

categories.name: Thermal Management
reference_questions: What is junction-to-ambient thermal resistance including heatsink and TIM?
What is maximum junction temperature at full load and max ambient?
What TIM is used? State thermal conductivity and bond-line thickness.
How is airflow provided? State flow rate and inlet temperature.

categories.name: EMI Filter & Compliance
reference_questions: What is the EMI filter topology? Provide schematic with component values.
What regulatory standards must be met? Provide measured emission margin.
What is common-mode choke inductance and current rating?
What creepage and clearance distances are required?
